Mirrors  >  Home  >  MPE Home  >  Th. List  >   Mathboxes  >  df-nmul Structured version   Visualization version   GIF version
Definition df-nmul 36535
Description: Define natural ordinal multiplication. This is the corresponding operation to df-nadd 8636. (Contributed by Scott Fenton, 2-Jun-2026.)
Assertion
Ref Expression
df-nmul ⊢ ·no = frecs({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), (𝑝 ∈ V, 𝑚 ∈ V ↦ ⦋(1st ‘𝑝) / 𝑎⦌⦋(2nd ‘𝑝) / 𝑏⦌∩ {𝑧 ∈ On ∣ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 ((𝑐𝑚𝑏) +no (𝑎𝑚𝑑)) ∈ (𝑧 +no (𝑐𝑚𝑑))}))
Distinct variable group:   𝑥,𝑦,𝑧,𝑝,𝑚,𝑎,𝑏,𝑐,𝑑

StepHypRef Expression

591, 58wceq 1560 1 wff ·no = frecs({⟨𝑥, 𝑦⟩ ∣ (𝑥 ∈ (On × On) ∧ 𝑦 ∈ (On × On) ∧ (((1st ‘𝑥) E (1st ‘𝑦) ∨ (1st ‘𝑥) = (1st ‘𝑦)) ∧ ((2nd ‘𝑥) E (2nd ‘𝑦) ∨ (2nd ‘𝑥) = (2nd ‘𝑦)) ∧ 𝑥 ≠ 𝑦))}, (On × On), (𝑝 ∈ V, 𝑚 ∈ V ↦ ⦋(1st ‘𝑝) / 𝑎⦌⦋(2nd ‘𝑝) / 𝑏⦌∩ {𝑧 ∈ On ∣ ∀𝑐 ∈ 𝑎 ∀𝑑 ∈ 𝑏 ((𝑐𝑚𝑏) +no (𝑎𝑚𝑑)) ∈ (𝑧 +no (𝑐𝑚𝑑))}))
